mapper.sql:
/* wms-outbound-obOrdSep-sql-oracle.xml - selectObSepRefSql - WMS > 출고 관리 > 출고편집 조회 SQL */ WITH OB_RESULT AS ( SELECT 0 AS CHK , OB.RNO , OB.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , OB.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , OB.OBHDDAY /*주문지시일시*/ , OB.OBREQDATE /*출고희망일자*/ , OB.OBORDKEY /*오더코드*/ , OB.OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드*/ , OB.EXTERNORDERKEY /*고객주문번호*/ , OB.OBHDTYPECD /*출고유형*/ , OB.OBSTATUSCD /*출고상태*/ , OD.ICKEY /*상품코드*/ , IC.ICNM /*상품명*/ , IC.SLPRC * OD.EXPCTQTY AS AMT /*단가*/ , OD.INITQTY /*주문수량*/ , OD.EXPCTQTY /*예정수량*/ , CASE WHEN IC.PCKGOVLPYN = 'Y' THEN ((COALESCE(ICUTX.WIDTH, 0) + (COALESCE(IC.OVLPPCKGWIDTHVAL, 0) * (OD.INITQTY- 1::INTEGER))) * (COALESCE(ICUTX.DEPTH, 0) + (COALESCE(IC.OVLPPCKGDEPTHVAL, 0) * (OD.INITQTY- 1::INTEGER))) * (COALESCE(ICUTX.HEIGHT, 0) + (COALESCE(IC.OVLPPCKGHEIGHTVAL, 0) * (OD.INITQTY- 1::INTEGER)))) * 0.000000001 ELSE COALESCE(ICUTX.VOL, 0) * OD.INITQTY END AS CBM_IND /*CBM*/ , (ICUTX.WEIGHT * OD.EXPCTQTY) / 1000 AS WEIGHT_IND /*중량*/ , ICUTXCTN.ICUNITQTY AS ICUNITQTY_CTN /*카톤입수*/ , ICUTXINN.ICUNITQTY AS ICUNITQTY_INN /*중포입수*/ , IC.PKOTICYN /*덕용여부*/ , IC.ROBSORTERICYN /*로봇여부*/ , (IC.SLPRC * OD.INITQTY) AS SLPRC /*금액*/ , OB.ORDSEPTYPECD /*주문유형*/ , OB.WKTYPECD /*작업유형*/ , OB.CBM /*총CBM*/ , OB.WEIGHT /*총중량*/ , OB.WBLNO /*송장번호*/ , OB.RECOMBOXBARCODE /*추천박스*/ , OB.BOXNM /*추천박스명*/ , OB.CMT /*비고*/ , OB.ORDSEPURKEY /*주문분리자*/ , OB.ORDSEPDATE /*주문분리일시*/ , OB.INSERTURKEY /*등록자*/ , OB.INSERTDATE /*등록일시*/ , OB.UPDATEURKEY /*수정자*/ , OB.UPDATEDATE /*수정일시*/ , OB.WAHDKEY , OD.OBDTSTATUSCD , OB.CTN_YN , OB.TOT_SLPRC /*총단가*/ , OB.AUTOLBYN_CTN /*카톤오토라벨러가능여부*/ , OB.AUTOLBYN_INN /*중포오토라벨러가능여부*/ , IC.HIGHFRQNCYDMGYN /*고빈도파손여부*/ FROM (
) OB INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OB.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OB.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OB.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON OD.CTKEY = IC.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND OD.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE ICUTX ON OD.CTKEY = ICUTX.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = ICUTX.OWKEY AND OD.ICKEY = ICUTX.ICKEY AND OD.ICUNITKEY = ICUTX.ICUNITKEY AND OD.UOM = ICUTX.ICUNITTYPECD LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE ICUTXCTN ON OD.CTKEY = ICUTXCTN.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = ICUTXCTN.OWKEY AND OD.ICKEY = ICUTXCTN.ICKEY AND OD.ICUNITKEY = ICUTXCTN.ICUNITKEY AND ICUTXCTN.ICUNITTYPECD = 'CTN' LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE ICUTXINN ON OD.CTKEY = ICUTXINN.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = ICUTXINN.OWKEY AND OD.ICKEY = ICUTXINN.ICKEY AND OD.ICUNITKEY = ICUTXINN.ICUNITKEY AND ICUTXINN.ICUNITTYPECD = 'INN' )
mapper.select:
/* wms-outbound-obOrdSep-sql-oracle.xml - selectobSepWorkTypeChgAllList - WMS > 출고 관리 > 출고편집 > 작업유형설정 - 검색조회결과 전체 대상(미대상) 조회 */
SELECT DISTINCT OH.CTKEY , OH.OWKEY , OH.OBORDKEY , OH.OBHDKEY , OH.WKTYPECD , #{worktypecd} AS TOWKTYPECD FROM OB_RESULT OH ORDER BY OH.OBORDKEY , OH.OBHDKEY

/* wms-outbound-obOrdSep-sql-oracle.xml - selectobSepStgAllList - WMS > 출고 관리 > 출고편집 > 자동분리 - 검색조회결과 전체 대상(미대상) 조회 */
SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , OBORDKEY , OBHDKEY , (CASE WHEN CNT = N_CNT AND WAHDKEY IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS PROC_YN FROM ( SELECT OH.CTKEY , OH.OWKEY , OH.OBORDKEY , OH.OBHDKEY , OH.WAHDKEY , COUNT(*) AS CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN OH.OBDTSTATUSCD = '00' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS N_CNT FROM OB_RESULT OH GROUP BY OH.CTKEY , OH.OWKEY , OH.OBORDKEY , OH.OBHDKEY , OH.WAHDKEY ) OB ORDER BY OBORDKEY , OBHDKEY

/* wms-outbound-obOrdSep-sql-oracle.xml - selectObSepAbsAllOrdkeyList - WMS > 출고 관리 > 출고편집 > 병합 - 검색조회결과 처리 가능 오더 코드 조회 */
SELECT DISTINCT CTKEY , OWKEY , OBORDKEY FROM OB_RESULT ORDER BY OBORDKEY

/* wms-outbound-obOrdSep-sql-oracle.xml - selectobSepAbsAllList - WMS > 출고 관리 > 출고편집 > 병합 - 검색조회결과 전체 대상(미대상) 조회 */
SELECT DISTINCT CTKEY , OWKEY , OBORDKEY , OBHDKEY FROM OB_RESULT ORDER BY OBORDKEY , OBHDKEY

/* wms-outbound-obOrdSep-sql-oracle.xml - selectObSepAbsPageOrdkeyList - WMS > 출고 관리 > 출고편집 > 병합 - 현재페이지 처리 가능 오더 코드 조회 */ SELECT DISTINCT OH.CTKEY , OH.OWKEY , OH.OBORDKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH WHERE
( OH.CTKEY = #{item.ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{item.owkey} AND OH.OBHDKEY = #{item.obhdkey})
1 = 2
ORDER BY OH.OBORDKEY

/* wms-outbound-obOrdSep-sql-oracle.xml - selectObSepAbsSelOrdkeyList - WMS > 출고 관리 > 출고편집 > 병합 - 선택대상 처리 가능 오더 코드 조회 */ SELECT DISTINCT OH.CTKEY , OH.OWKEY , OH.OBORDKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH WHERE
( OH.CTKEY = #{item.ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{item.owkey} AND OH.OBHDKEY = #{item.obhdkey})
1 = 2
ORDER BY OH.OBORDKEY

/* wms-outbound-obOrdSep-sql-oracle.xml - selectObSepPopAutoSep - WMS > 출고 관리 > 출고편집 > 자동분리 - 전략 헤더 조회 */ SELECT 0 AS CHK , INFO.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , INFO.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , INFO.ORDSEPSTGCD /*주문 분리 전략코드*/ , MST.ORDSEPSTGNM /*주문 분리 전략명*/ , INFO.ORDSEPPRI /*주문 분리 우선 순위*/ , INFO.ORDSEPCRITCD /*주문 분리 기준코드*/ , INFO.QTY /*PCS*/ , INFO.QTYRNGCD /*PCS구간*/ , INFO.VOL /*CBM*/ , INFO.VOLRNGCD /*CBM구간*/ , INFO.WEIGHT /*중량*/ , INFO.WEIGHTRNGCD /*중량구간*/ , '' AS ICKEY , '' AS ICNM FROM TWORK_INFO_ORD_SEP_STG_MSTR MST INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_ORD_SEP_STG INFO ON MST.CTKEY = INFO.CTKEY AND MST.OWKEY = INFO.OWKEY AND MST.ORDSEPSTGCD = INFO.ORDSEPSTGCD WHERE MST.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND MST.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND MST.USEYN = 'Y'

/* wms-outbound-obOrdSep-sql-oracle.xml - selectObSepPopObdtInfoMst - WMS > 출고 관리 > 출고편집 > 출고주문정보 상세 - 출고주문 정보조회 */ SELECT DISTINCT OHR.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , OHR.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , OHR.OBORDKEY /*오더코드*/ , OHR.ORHDKEY /*S/O주문번호*/ , OHR.EXTERNORDERKEY /*고객주문번호*/ , OHR.OBHDDAY /*출고예정일*/ , OHR.OBREQDATE /*출고예정일자*/ , OHR.OBHDTYPECD /*출고유형*/ , pkg_crypto$decrypt(OHR.ORDNM, #{encKey}) AS ORDNM /*주문자명*/ , pkg_crypto$decrypt(OHR.RCPPRSNNM, #{encKey}) AS RCPPRSNNM /*수령인명*/ , pkg_crypto$decrypt(OHR.RCPPRSNTELNO, #{encKey}) AS RCPPRSNTELNO /*전화번호*/ , pkg_crypto$decrypt(OHR.RCPPRSNADDR1, #{encKey}) AS RCPPRSNADDR1 /*주소1*/ , OHR.DLVYMSG /*배송메세지*/ , OHR.CMT /*비고*/ FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_ORD_HD OHR ON OH.CTKEY = OHR.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OHR.OWKEY AND OH.OBORDKEY = OHR.OBORDKEY WHERE OH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND (OH.OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} OR OH.OBORDKEY = #{obhdkey})

/* wms-outbound-obOrdSep-sql-oracle.xml - selectObSepPopObdtInfoHd - WMS > 출고 관리 > 출고편집 > 출고주문정보 상세 - 출고 정보 조회 */ SELECT 0 AS CHK , OH.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , OH.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , OH.OBHDKEY /*출고번호*/ , OH.OBSTATUSCD /*출고상태*/ , OH.CBM /*체적*/ , (OH.WEIGHT / 1000) AS WEIGHT /*중량*/ , OH.ORDSEPTYPECD /*주문분리유형*/ , OH.ORDSEPCRITCD /*주문분리기준*/ , OH.ORDSEPCRITVAL /*주문분리기준값*/ , OH.ORDSEPURKEY /*주문분리자*/ , OH.ORDSEPDATE /*주문분리일시*/ , OH.RECOMBOXBARCODE /*추천포장박스*/ , BOX.BOXNM /*박스명*/ , OH.WKTYPECD /*작업유형*/ , OH.OBORDKEY /*출고주문번호*/ FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_BOX BOX ON OH.CTKEY = BOX.CTKEY AND OH.RECOMBOXBARCODE = BOX.BOXBARCODE WHERE OH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND (OH.OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} OR OH.OBORDKEY = #{obhdkey}) ORDER BY OH.OBHDKEY

/* wms-outbound-obOrdSep-sql-oracle.xml - selectObSepPopObdtInfoDt - WMS > 출고 관리 > 출고편집 > 출고주문정보 상세 - 출고 상세정보 조회 */ SELECT 0 AS CHK , OD.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , OD.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , OH.OBORDKEY /*오더코드*/ , OD.OBHDKEY /*출고번호*/ , OD.OBDTKEY /*출고주문상세번호*/ , OD.ICKEY /*상품코드*/ , IC.ICNM /*상품명*/ , ICUTX.VOL * OD.EXPCTQTY AS CBM , (ICUTX.WEIGHT * OD.EXPCTQTY) / 1000 AS WEIGHT , IC.SLPRC /*단가*/ , IC.HIGHFRQNCYDMGYN /*고빈도파손여부*/ , GREATEST(COALESCE(ICUTX.WIDTH, 0), COALESCE(ICUTX.DEPTH, 0), COALESCE(ICUTX.HEIGHT, 0)) AS MAXLENGTH , IC.ROBSORTERICYN /*로봇상품여부*/ , OD.OBDTSTATUSCD /*출고상세상태*/ , OD.UOM /*단위*/ , OD.EXPCTQTY /*예정수량*/ , 0 AS SEPQTY /*분리수량*/ FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON OD.CTKEY = IC.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND OD.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE ICUTX ON IC.CTKEY = ICUTX.CTKEY AND IC.OWKEY = ICUTX.OWKEY AND IC.ICKEY = ICUTX.ICKEY AND IC.ICUNITKEY = ICUTX.ICUNITKEY AND ICUTX.ICUNITTYPECD = OD.UOM WHERE OH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OH.OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} ORDER BY OD.OBHDKEY , OD.OBDTKEY

/* wms-outbound-obOrdSep-sql-oracle.xml - selectObSepPopInfoRvtList - WMS > 출고 관리 > 출고편집 > 출고주문정보 상세 > 원복 - 출고 정보 조회 */ SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , OBORDKEY FROM ( SELECT OH.CTKEY , OH.OWKEY , OH.OBORDKEY , COUNT(*) AS CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN OD.OBDTSTATUSCD = '00' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS N_CNT FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY WHERE OH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OH.OBORDKEY = #{obordkey} AND OH.WAHDKEY IS NULL GROUP BY OH.CTKEY , OH.OWKEY , OH.OBORDKEY ) WHERE CNT = N_CNT

/* wms-outbound-obOrdSep-sql-oracle.xml - selectObSepPopInfoAbsList - WMS > 출고 관리 > 출고편집 > 출고주문정보 상세 > 병합 - 출고 정보 조회 */ SELECT OH.CTKEY , OH.OWKEY , OH.OBHDKEY , OH.OBORDKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH WHERE
( OH.CTKEY = #{item.ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{item.owkey} AND OH.OBHDKEY = #{item.obhdkey})
1 = 2
AND OH.OBSTATUSCD = '00' AND OH.WAHDKEY IS NULL ORDER BY OH.CTKEY , OH.OWKEY , OH.OBHDKEY

/* wms-outbound-obOrdSep-sql-oracle.xml - selectObSepPopInfoManualList - WMS > 출고 관리 > 출고편집 > 출고주문정보 상세 > 수동분리 - 출고 정보 조회 */ SELECT OH.CTKEY , OH.OWKEY , OH.OBHDKEY
, 'NOT_STATUS_NOT_ABS' AS ERR_CODE
FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH WHERE
( OH.CTKEY = #{item.ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{item.owkey} AND OH.OBHDKEY = #{item.obhdkey})
1 = 2
AND OH.OBSTATUSCD = '00' AND OH.WAHDKEY IS NULL
AND (OH.OBSTATUSCD NOT IN ('00') OR OH.WAHDKEY IS NOT NULL)
ORDER BY OH.CTKEY , OH.OWKEY , OH.OBHDKEY

/* wms-outbound-obOrdSep-sql-oracle.xml - selectObSepExcel - WMS > 출고 관리 > 출고편집 조회 */ SELECT OB.RNO , OB.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , OB.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , OB.OBHDDAY /*주문지시일시*/ , OB.OBREQDATE /*출고희망일자*/ , OB.OBORDKEY /*오더코드*/ , OB.OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드*/ , OB.EXTERNORDERKEY /*고객주문번호*/
, CD1.CTCDDTNM AS OBHDTYPECD /*출고유형*/
, CD2.CTCDDTNM AS OBSTATUSCD /*출고상태*/ , OD.ICKEY /*상품코드*/ , IC.ICNM /*상품명*/ , IC.SLPRC AS AMT /*단가*/ , OD.INITQTY /*주문수량*/ , OD.EXPCTQTY /*예정수량*/ , ICUTX.VOL * OD.EXPCTQTY AS CBM_IND /*CBM*/ , (ICUTX.WEIGHT * OD.EXPCTQTY) / 1000 AS WEIGHT_IND /*중량*/ , ICUTXCTN.ICUNITQTY AS ICUNITQTY_CTN /*카톤입수*/ , ICUTXINN.ICUNITQTY AS ICUNITQTY_INN /*중포입수*/ , IC.PKOTICYN /*덕용여부*/ , IC.ROBSORTERICYN /*로봇여부*/ , (IC.SLPRC * OD.INITQTY) AS SLPRC /*금액*/
, CD3.CTCDDTNM AS ORDSEPTYPECD /*주문유형*/
, CD4.CTCDDTNM AS WKTYPECD /*작업유형*/ , OB.CBM /*총CBM*/ , OB.WEIGHT /*총중량*/ , OB.WBLNO /*송장번호*/ , OB.RECOMBOXBARCODE /*추천박스*/ , OB.BOXNM /*추천박스명*/ , OB.CMT /*비고*/ , OB.ORDSEPURKEY /*주문분리자*/ , OB.ORDSEPDATE /*주문분리일시*/ , OB.INSERTURKEY /*등록자*/ , OB.INSERTDATE /*등록일시*/ , OB.UPDATEURKEY /*수정자*/ , OB.UPDATEDATE /*수정일시*/ , OB.WAHDKEY
, CD5.CTCDDTNM AS OBDTSTATUSCD /*출고상세상태*/ , OB.CTN_YN , OB.TOT_SLPRC /*총단가*/ , OB.AUTOLBYN_CTN /*카톤오토라벨러가능여부*/ , OB.AUTOLBYN_INN /*중포오토라벨러가능여부*/ , IC.HIGHFRQNCYDMGYN /*고빈도파손여부*/ FROM (
) OB INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OB.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OB.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OB.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON OD.CTKEY = IC.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND OD.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE ICUTX ON OD.CTKEY = ICUTX.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = ICUTX.OWKEY AND OD.ICKEY = ICUTX.ICKEY AND OD.ICUNITKEY = ICUTX.ICUNITKEY AND OD.UOM = ICUTX.ICUNITTYPECD LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE ICUTXCTN ON OD.CTKEY = ICUTXCTN.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = ICUTXCTN.OWKEY AND OD.ICKEY = ICUTXCTN.ICKEY AND OD.ICUNITKEY = ICUTXCTN.ICUNITKEY AND ICUTXCTN.ICUNITTYPECD = 'CTN' LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE ICUTXINN ON OD.CTKEY = ICUTXINN.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = ICUTXINN.OWKEY AND OD.ICKEY = ICUTXINN.ICKEY AND OD.ICUNITKEY = ICUTXINN.ICUNITKEY AND ICUTXINN.ICUNITTYPECD = 'INN' INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CTCD_DT CD1 /*출고유형*/ ON OB.CTKEY = CD1.CTKEY AND OB.OBHDTYPECD = CD1.CTCDDTKEY AND CD1.CTCDHDKEY = 'OBHDTYPECD' INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CTCD_DT CD2 /*출고상태*/ ON OB.CTKEY = CD2.CTKEY AND OB.OBSTATUSCD = CD2.CTCDDTKEY AND CD2.CTCDHDKEY = 'OBSTATUSCD' INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CTCD_DT CD3 /*주문유형*/ ON OB.CTKEY = CD3.CTKEY AND OB.ORDSEPTYPECD = CD3.CTCDDTKEY AND CD3.CTCDHDKEY = 'ORDSEPTYPECD' LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_CTCD_DT CD4 /*작업유형*/ ON OB.CTKEY = CD4.CTKEY AND OB.WKTYPECD = CD4.CTCDDTKEY AND CD4.CTCDHDKEY = 'WKTYPECD' INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CTCD_DT CD5 /*출고상세상태*/ ON OD.CTKEY = CD5.CTKEY AND OD.OBDTSTATUSCD = CD5.CTCDDTKEY AND CD5.CTCDHDKEY = 'OBSTATUSCD' ORDER BY OBORDKEY , OBHDKEY , ICKEY
